ItacAcademyItem.Name: Immaturi (Accademia degli)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: Publications not in British Library catalogue, include: Mostre poetiche dell`Incolto accademico Immaturo (Venezia 1620), dedicated to Niccolo` Crasso and to be ascribed to Giovan Francesco Ferranti (see Cicogna, Iscrizioni veneziane, vol. 2, p. 557)
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
